calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions And Order That Alleged Third Amendment To Declaration Of Trust Is Invalid And That Alleged Transfer Of Real Property Is Invalid And For Final Distribution Of The Trust Pursuant To The Second Amendment Of The Trust
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Mary Mayo appearing for Trustee Kathleen Echiverri. No one appeared to object to the petition. Counsel presented the three emails she received to the Court. Issue on the signatures on the amendments raised by counsel. Matter submitted. Judge Pro Tem: Stella Pantazis. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
